blacksmith.context: forges weapons and armour, wary of outsiders but values craftsmanship

innkeeper.context: runs a small seaside inn, loves gossip and knows everyone's business

merchant.context: travels between settlements selling rare goods from distant lands

guard.context: protects the realm, suspicious of strangers, values order and duty

scholar.context: studies arcane lore and forgotten histories, speaks in riddles

ranger.context: guides travelers through dangerous terrain, knows secrets of the wilds

priest.context: tends to the spiritual needs of the people, keeper of ancient rituals

rogue.context: moves in shadows, deals in information and favors

noble.context: moves in upper circles, concerned with politics and prestige

farmer.context: works the land, simple values, distrusts magic and city folk
